title: Zesty Chinese-Style Fried Chicken
description: A twist on traditional Chinese fried chicken, with a zesty kick from the spicy sauce. This dish is perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, zesty seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and dip each piece in the flour mixture, coating completely.
Heat about 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and fry until golden brown and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In the same skillet, add the chopped brazilian pepper and spicy sauce. Stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and toss to coat with the spicy sauce mixture.
